fields.name: Primary Key
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Update Gen. Prod. Post. Groups
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT rate change for general product posting groups.

fields.name: Update G/L Accounts
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT rate change for general ledger accounts.

fields.name: Update Items
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT rate change for items.

fields.name: Update Item Templates
fields.tooltip: Specifies that VAT rate changes are updated for item categories.

fields.name: Update Item Charges
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT rate change for item charges.

fields.name: Update Resources
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT rate change for resources.

fields.name: Update Gen. Journal Lines
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT rate change for general journal lines.

fields.name: Update Gen. Journal Allocation
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT rate change for general journal allocation.

fields.name: Update Std. Gen. Jnl. Lines
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT rate change for standard general journal lines.

fields.name: Update Res. Journal Lines
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT rate change for resource journal lines.

fields.name: Update Job Journal Lines
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT rate change for job journal lines.

fields.name: Update Requisition Lines
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT rate change for requisition lines.

fields.name: Update Std. Item Jnl. Lines
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT rate change for standard item journal lines.

fields.name: Update Sales Documents
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT rate change for sales documents.

fields.name: Update Purchase Documents
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT rate change for purchase documents.

fields.name: Update Reminders
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT rate change for reminders.

fields.name: Update Finance Charge Memos
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT rate change for finance charge memos.

fields.name: VAT Rate Change Tool Completed
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the VAT rate change conversion is complete.

fields.name: Ignore Status on Sales Docs.
fields.tooltip: Specifies that all existing sales documents regardless of status, including documents with a status of released, are updated.

fields.name: Ignore Status on Purch. Docs.
fields.tooltip: Specifies all existing purchase documents regardless of status, including documents with a status of released, are updated.

fields.name: Perform Conversion
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the VAT rate conversion is performed on existing data.

fields.name: Item Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies which items will be updated by setting appropriate filters.

fields.name: Account Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies which accounts will be updated by setting appropriate filters.

fields.name: Resource Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies which resources will be updated by setting appropriate filters.

fields.name: Update Unit Price For G/L Acc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the unit price must be updated for document lines that have the type G/L Account.

fields.name: Upd. Unit Price For Item Chrg.
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the unit price must be updated for document lines that have the type Charge (Item).

fields.name: Upd. Unit Price For FA
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the unit price must be updated for document lines that have the type Fixed Asset.
